sections.title: Before talking to Captain Pudi with level 35 Fishing

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, how's it go...

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Apples, trout. Maybe some spi... Oh sorry matey, busy getting the grub together for our next voyage. If ye need anything, talk t' Captain Pudi over by the dock.

sections.title: After talking to Captain Pudi with level 35 Fishing

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: I wonder what jelly would be like with cooked eels? Maybe a pie of some sor... Oh hey there stranger. What can I do for ye?

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Crab meat would do wonders in an admir... Oh hey there stranger. What can I do for ye?

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Maybe some pineapple. That could enhance the flavour of a summer pi... Oh hey there stranger. What can I do for ye?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How was your last fishing trip?

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: 'Twas a good and bad trip.

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: During the trip, I was cookin' up a nice fish pie for the crew. But then a storm 'it the ship.

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Water came a spewin' through the windows and with the water came some glowing fish. It flew straight into me cooking pie.

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: I couldn't 'elp it, I 'ad to try it... The taste was amazin'! Never 'ad anythin' like it in me life before.

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Maybe one day I will make that amazing pie again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds great. If you ever do make it again, tell me the recipe so I can make it myself please.

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Me recipes are a secret and I am not sharin' 'em with anyone!

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: On with me story. after trying that amazing pie, the floor boards above fell down and the ship's wheel knocked me out.

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: I woke up in Al Kharid with the others. Pudi and some local fisherfolk helped us out and now we're 'ere. Lots o' mouths t' feed now!

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Anythin' else ya be needin'?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You really like cooking. Can you share any recipes with me?

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Unfortunately for ye, me recipes are a secret and I am not sharin' 'em with anyone!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aw, please tell me! I've always wanted to try sailor food.

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Ye best become a sailor then.

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Anythin' else ya be needin'?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got any tips for fighting Tempoross?

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Ye should bring a harpoon t' fish for them harpoonfish. They be very effective against the beast.

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Ye could try cooking them too. Helps 'em shoot true.

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Anythin' else ya be needin'?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have to go.

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: See ya around!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you care for an egg in this difficult time?

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: A damp egg! What a tragedy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: A fate most foul has befallen our eggy friend 'ere!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wait a min-

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: This egg, once so full o' promise, set out on an adventure t' become somethin' more...

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: ...alas, it fell victim t' the briny depths thanks t' Tempoross. That fiend!

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Perhaps a cake, this egg dreamt t' be? We shall never know, for a damp egg is only good as a solemn reminder of the things we've lost.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow. You really like eggs, don't you?

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Aye, they truly are the most majestic an' versatile item in the culinary world. An inspiration t' us all!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There there, it'll be okay.

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Thank ye, friend.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you care for an egg in this difficult time?

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Oh a gloriously dry egg! What a gift!

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Thank ye!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're welcome!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you like a salmon?

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Wha' am I supposed t' do wit' a raw salmon?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Cook and eat it, of course.

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Do I look like some sort o' on demand chef t' ye.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fine, I'll take my salmon elsewhere then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you like a freshly cooked salmon?

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Aye, I be very hungry today. Skipped breakfast.

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Thanks a lot, landlubber. I appreciate it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you make of this egg?

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: AAAHH!!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is it?

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: That egg!

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: 'Tis horrifyin'!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just looks like an egg to me...

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Shiver me timbers!

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: That there egg that ye unfortunately possess 'as a spooky soul.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Surely an egg doesn't have a soul-

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: An omen, perhaps? Is our fight against Tempoross about t' take a turn for the worse?

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: Perhaps it's even bigger than that...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Look, I was just given this egg as a trick while Trick- or-Treating. It's just a joke!

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: A cruel trick is what it be! I wouldn't trust whoever gave yet that... thing!

lines.speaker: Timallus
lines.text: There be shady dealings goin' on there, me friend, mark me words!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you say so...
